data_description.ip_address: Local IP address of the charger on your network.
data_description.model: v1 — older firmware (41 fields, integer values). v2 — newer firmware (97 fields, includes sub-state, IEM energy meters, Wi-Fi signal).
data_description.username: Leave empty if the charger has no authentication configured.
data_description.password: Leave empty if the charger has no authentication configured.
data_description.device_prefix: Prefix for all entity IDs. For example, prefix 'eveus_home' produces sensor.eveus_home_state, sensor.eveus_home_currentset, etc. Leave empty to use the entry ID.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the charger. Check the IP address and that the charger is reachable.

data_description.update_interval: How often to poll the charger for new data. Range: 5–300 seconds.
